title: Workspace-root Kanbus discovery + single-root kbs usage
description:
Goal: move nested project discovery into Kanbus and make PyPixoo kanbus_clock call kbs from a single root.

Scope: Kanbus recursive .kanbus.yml discovery (breaking), unique-only fragment resolution, PyPixoo update to use single kbs root.

Done when: BDD specs pass, PyPixoo tests pass, and manual clock acceptance confirmed.
